race.description: Elite Sand And Soil Country Boosted Maiden Showcase Plate
race.comment: FORTHEO (2) fourth-up for this and a win looks imminent. Stalked the speed and kept finding with a courageous second over 1450m at Muswellbrook. Gets the right set-up and no excuses today. STREET FORCE (11) jumped in trip at her second career start with a slashing fourth from back in the field over 1250m at Newcastle. Likely to go back again and prove hard to hold out in a winnable contest. FLEE WITH ME (9) ran a much better race from back in the field to secure third over 1280m at Orange in a Super Maiden. On the quick back-up and has each way claims. HOT CHOCKS (6) back for his second prep when slow into stride for a disappointing sixth over 1100m at Scone as the ($1.40 fav). Should appreciate the extra ground and Reece Jones sticks.
